description_long: This is a rustic wooden fence composed of two vertical posts connected by two uneven, horizontally placed rails. The wood appears stylized and slightly warped, giving the fence a handcrafted, natural look. Metal brackets or fasteners are visible at the rail-post junctions, adding structural support and a subtle industrial touch. The fence is relatively low, suitable for marking boundaries in parks, gardens, or along sidewalks without obstructing views. The top and bottom rails are irregularly shaped, contributing to a casual, organic aesthetic. The overall construction suggests it is lightweight and movable, ideal for temporary or decorative urban installations.
description: A low, rustic wooden fence with two uneven horizontal rails and visible metal fasteners, featuring a handcrafted, natural appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the fence, with both rails and all four metal fasteners clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the narrow profile of the fence, with the thickness of the posts and rails visible but little detail on the rails themselves.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the rails and fasteners from the opposite side, with the same irregular wood pattern.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thin profile and the alignment of the posts and rails.
